string-array.name: whats_new_items
string-array.item: NEW: Privacy & Security pack — APK risk scan, network privacy dots, browser data cleanup
NEW: Privacy profiles (Balanced / Strict / Game) — walk through permission revokes in one flow
NEW: Modes — Game / Travel / Focus / Privacy / Storage-Saver bundles, one tap to apply, one tap to restore
NEW: Auto-rules — react to low storage, charging, boot, weekly schedules and open Wi-Fi
Dashboard refresh: Privacy Score card and active-mode chip in the top bar
Free tier now ships with daily quotas (3 audits, 1 profile, 1 mode switch). PRO removes the cap
Still honest: every score derives from PackageManager, ConnectivityManager & StorageStatsManager — no network calls
